purpose: Defines strict replay state taxonomy and target-head matching rules for independent replay claims.
required_questions: Does replay exist for this exact target head?
What cap is triggered if mismatch exists?
warn_criteria: Replay exists only for older target
External replay acceptance pending stricter review
block_criteria: Current replay claim with mismatched heads
State NONE with replay evidence present
next_action: Bind taxonomy into matrix-level checker and migration fixtures.
